case_title: MONROE, SHANNON VS BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MONROE, SHANNON AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONROE, SHANNON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS
